reviews.review_description: Steering the car works very well on the Quest and playing the game is a lot of fun. To steer left and right you need to tilt the controller in that direction. That’s probably hard to do for some people but I find it rather easy.
I feel robbed since developer's don't feel the need to respond to this one measly customer. Integrity goes a long ways . I just want my money back! Galaxy note5

developer_response.body: We've updated version and fixed this bug, please try to reinstall. The app had conflict with our other game Space Stalker. Deeply apologise for that.

reviews.review_description: This game is already a great value. For $2 you get 5 great levels with a high replayability factor. This game is a lot like Blazerush for the Rift, but the action is closer and looks fantastic!  If the devs are able to add multi-player, this game would become an instant GearVR classic.

I thought I could use my paired Xbox one s controller with this but only the A button works. It is fun to play but difficult with the existing Go controller. I would love for it to have fill co troller support. It kind of like Micro Machines game 
 Frantic and fun, if a little hard to control

reviews.review_title: I bought this for one reason
reviews.review_description: The developer. Been a fan of Fibrum for a while. Please bring "Chair Swing" to GearVR.

It's kids game, but really good in VR experience, and also better than 99% rest rubbish games/apps here !
Bluetooth controller is working well !
Unplayable with Oculus Go Controller and no gamepad support!

The game might be good with gamepad support. Currently a waste of time trying to use the Go controller with it. Camera angle should be able to be chosen, currently causes motion sickness. This is the first game on the Go that has caused motion sickness for me.
